title: Does Yosys-config take DESTDIR into account?
body:
### Version

0.49

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

1. Install Yosys in a custom directory.
2. Check `bindir` and `datdir` using  the yosys-config utility:
    - `yosys-config --bindir`
    - `yosys-config --datdir`

To make it easier for you to reproduce the error, you can build the following container (pointing to the target `build`):

```dockerfile
# Author:
#   Unai Sainz-Estebanez
# Email:
#  <unai.sainze@ehu.eus>
#
# Licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0;
# You may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html

# Yosys container to check the behavior of yosys-config  

MAINTAINER <unike267@gmail.com>

FROM ubuntu:latest AS base

ARG LLVM_VER="18"

# Install dependencies
RUN apt-get update -qq \
 && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -y install --no-install-recommends \
    bison \
    ca-certificates \
    clang-$LLVM_VER \
    flex \
    gawk \
    g++ \
    graphviz \
    libboost-filesystem-dev \
    libboost-python-dev \
    libboost-system-dev \
    libffi-dev \
    libreadline-dev \
    lld \
    make \
    pkg-config \
    python3 \
    tcl-dev \
    xdot \
    zlib1g-dev \
# Autoclean, clean and autoremove
 && apt-get autoclean && apt-get clean && apt-get -y autoremove \
 && update-ca-certificates \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* 

# Compiler versions
RUN echo "Compiler Versions:" \
 && clang-$LLVM_VER --version \
 && gcc --version 

FROM base AS build

ENV PATH="$PATH:/opt/yosys/usr/local/bin" 

# Install Yosys 
RUN apt-get update -qq \
 && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -y install --no-install-recommends \
    git \
 && git clone --recursive https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys \
 && cd yosys \
 && make -j$(nproc) \
 && make DESTDIR=/opt/yosys install \
 && cd .. \
 && rm -rf yosys 

# Check yosys-config directories 
RUN yosys --version \
 && echo "yosys-config --bindir:" \
 && yosys-config --bindir \
 && echo "yosys-config --datdir:" \
 && yosys-config --datdir \
 && echo "ls /usr/local/bin:" \
 && ls -lah /usr/local/bin \
 && echo "ls /usr/local/share:" \
 && ls -lah /usr/local/share \
 && echo "ls /opt/yosys/usr/local:" \
 && ls -lah /opt/yosys/usr/local
```

### Expected Behavior

The correct response should be:

- `yosys-config --bindir`:
    
```bash
/opt/yosys/usr/local/bin
```
- `yosys-config --datdir`:

```bash
/opt/yosys/usr/local/share/yosys
``` 

Note: I'm using the container context as an example.

### Actual Behavior

The current output is:

- `yosys-config --bindir`:

```bash
/usr/local/bin
```
- `yosys-config --datdir`:

```bash
/usr/local/share/yosys
``` 

As shown in the following image:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/55b33acb-8b80-4750-a8af-96797404b660)

The `yosys-config` utility does not seem to update the directories dynamically.
code_blocks:

# Yosys container to check the behavior of yosys-config  

MAINTAINER <unike267@gmail.com>

FROM ubuntu:latest AS base

# Install dependencies
RUN apt-get update -qq \

RUN echo "Compiler Versions:" \

FROM base AS build

ENV PATH="$PATH:/opt/yosys/usr/local/bin"

RUN apt-get update -qq \

# Check yosys-config directories 
RUN yosys --version \

 && ls -lah /usr/local/share \
 && echo "ls /opt/yosys/usr/local:" \
 && ls -lah /opt/yosys/usr/local
